title: Crispy Asparagus Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired dish featuring crispy asparagus and a tangy citrus sauce.

ingredients.name: Citrus sauce (or substitute with soy sauce)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the asparagus to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the citrus sauce, ginger, and garlic.
Pour the citrus sauce mixture over the asparagus and stir to coat.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the asparagus is tender and lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with additional citrus sauce if desired.
